text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, December 20. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I can run some projections for you. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Went for a run around the neighborhood. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Refinancing is a great leverage point. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a common bottleneck. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Great consistency with running. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
